canonical_answer: A woman with light brown hair pulled back wears a white long-sleeved top and a white and mint green scarf with dark blue pom-poms. She speaks directly to the camera throughout the sequence. A white window frame with closed horizontal blinds is visible in the background behind her. A light brown wooden board leans against the light blue wall on the left side. She raises her right hand to her chest area while talking.
